targets.rawSql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    resource_type,
    asset_id,
    COUNT(*) AS hits,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY resource_type
      ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    ) AS r
  FROM asset_access_log
  WHERE status = 200
  GROUP BY resource_type, asset_id
)
SELECT
  resource_type AS type,
  asset_id AS asset,
  hits
FROM ranked
WHERE r <= 20
ORDER BY type, hits DESC;

SELECT
  CONCAT(resource_type, '/', asset_id) AS identifier,
  COUNT(*) AS hits
FROM asset_access_log
WHERE status = 200
GROUP BY resource_type, asset_id
ORDER BY hits DESC
LIMIT 20;
